title: Raccoon Removal in Malverne, NY | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Malverne, Long Island. Licensed experts offering humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Serving all Malverne neighborhoods. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Malverne's tree-lined residential streets, seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces throughout this charming Long Island village. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services to Malverne homeowners, combining humane trapping with permanent exclusion solutions. Our licensed technicians protect your property from raccoon damage while ensuring safe, effective removal tailored to Malverne's unique housing landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife control experience to Malverne, with certified technicians who understand the specific raccoon challenges facing Long Island communities. We offer transparent pricing, same-day emergency service, and guaranteed workmanship that keeps raccoons out for good.
localContext: Malverne's mature trees and proximity to parks like Malverne Park and the nearby Hempstead Lake State Park create ideal raccoon habitats, while the village's historic homes and newer constructions both present entry points for these persistent animals. Our team is familiar with Malverne's architectural styles, from pre-war colonials to mid-century ranches, ensuring customized exclusion solutions that preserve your home's integrity.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Malverne?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Malverne typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and extent of attic damage or contamination. A basic removal with one entry point starts around $900, while extensive infestations requiring multiple traps, full-home exclusion, and attic restoration can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Malverne neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common throughout Malverne due to the village's abundant trees, accessible garbage, and proximity to green spaces. They frequently den in attics, chimneys, and under porches, particularly in the fall and spring when mothers seek safe nesting sites. Malverne's residential neighborhoods provide ideal foraging and shelter opportunities for these adaptable animals.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in Malverne humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, live-catch traps and follows all New York State Department of Environmental Conservation regulations for raccoon removal. We never use poisons or harmful methods, and all raccoons are handled according to strict legal guidelines. Our exclusion methods prevent re-entry without harming the animals.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Malverne home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Malverne for urgent raccoon situations. Initial trap setup typically occurs within 24 hours of your call, with most raccoons captured within 3-7 days. Complete exclusion work to seal entry points is performed immediately after removal to prevent new raccoons from entering. Timeline varies based on the number of animals and complexity of the infestation.
